phases.title: JavaScript & TypeScript Foundation
phases.description: Rock-solid JS/TS foundation — the base of everything

topics.title: Types, Coercion, Scope, Closures
tasks: Experiment: typeof, == vs ===, truthy/falsy, coercion edge cases
Build: memoize(), once(), debounce() from scratch
Fix: classic for-loop + setTimeout bug without let

topics.title: Functions, `this`, Prototypes
tasks: Build: pipe(), compose(), curry(), myBind(), myCall()
Experiment: 4 this-binding rules + prototype chain
Build: class inheritance without class keyword

topics.title: Async Mastery: Promises & Event Loop
tasks: Build: fetchWithRetry(), parallelLimit(), timeout()
Build: Promise from scratch
Experiment: microtask vs macrotask queue

topics.title: DOM & Browser APIs
tasks: Build: Todo app (vanilla JS, CRUD, event delegation)
Build: lazy loader (IntersectionObserver), infinite scroll
Experiment: MutationObserver, ResizeObserver, fetch API

topics.title: TypeScript v6 + Design Patterns
tasks: TS: generics, utility types, discriminated unions
Build: EventEmitter, reactive() + effect() from scratch
tsconfig.json deep understanding, strict mode

topics.title: React 19.2 Deep Dive
tasks: Hooks: useState, useEffect, useRef, useReducer, useContext
React 19: use() hook, Actions, useOptimistic, React Compiler
Custom hooks: useDebounce, useLocalStorage, useFetch
Patterns: compound components, headless UI, state colocation

topics.title: State Management & Forms
tasks: Zustand v5: global state, persist middleware
TanStack Query v5: useQuery, useMutation, caching
React Hook Form + Zod v4: type-safe forms
Optimistic updates, error handling UX

topics.title: CSS, Tailwind v4.3, Accessibility
tasks: Flexbox & Grid mastery, responsive design
Tailwind v4: CSS-first config, @theme, container queries
A11y: semantic HTML, ARIA, keyboard nav, Lighthouse audit
Design tokens: Figma → code extraction

topics.title: Next.js 16 App Router
tasks: Server Components vs Client Components
Server Actions, route handlers, middleware
Data fetching patterns, caching, revalidation
SEO: Metadata API, partial prerendering (PPR)

phases.title: Backend & API Engineering
phases.description: Build & integrate APIs — FDE must handle the full stack

topics.title: Node.js Backend & REST APIs
tasks: Express/Fastify: routing, middleware, error handling
REST design: naming, status codes, pagination, versioning
Input validation: Zod schemas, error responses
File handling: uploads, streams, S3-compatible storage

topics.title: Databases & Data Engineering
tasks: PostgreSQL: SQL, joins, indexes, transactions, query optimization
Prisma ORM: schema, migrations, type-safe queries
Redis: caching, sessions, rate limiting, pub/sub
MongoDB basics: document model, aggregation pipeline

topics.title: Authentication & Integration
tasks: JWT: tokens, refresh tokens, token rotation
OAuth 2.0: authorization code flow, PKCE
API integrations: REST clients, webhooks, error handling
RBAC: role-based access control

topics.title: GraphQL & Real-time
tasks: GraphQL: schema, queries, mutations, subscriptions
Client: urql or Apollo — when GraphQL > REST
WebSockets: real-time communication (Socket.io)
BFF (Backend for Frontend) pattern

phases.title: Infrastructure & DevOps
phases.description: Deploy, scale, monitor — FDE ships to production

topics.title: Linux & Networking
tasks: Linux: commands, permissions, processes, SSH
Networking: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, firewalls
Shell scripting: bash basics
Troubleshooting: logs, curl, dig, netstat

topics.title: Docker & Containers
tasks: Docker: images, containers, volumes, networks
Dockerfile: multi-stage builds, best practices
Docker Compose: multi-container apps
Container registries: Docker Hub, ECR

topics.title: Cloud Platforms (AWS)
tasks: EC2: instances, security groups, key pairs
S3: storage, static hosting, presigned URLs
RDS: managed databases, backups
IAM: users, roles, policies (least privilege)
Lambda: serverless functions basics

topics.title: CI/CD & Automation
tasks: GitHub Actions: workflows, secrets, environments
Pipeline: lint → test → build → deploy
Preview deployments, release management
Semantic versioning, changelogs

topics.title: Monitoring & Observability
tasks: Logging: structured logging, log levels (Pino)
Metrics: Prometheus + Grafana basics
Error tracking: Sentry integration
Health checks, alerting, uptime monitoring

phases.title: Security & Compliance
phases.description: Secure by default — FDE handles sensitive customer data

topics.title: Application Security
tasks: OWASP Top 10: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, SSRF
Auth security: JWT best practices, token storage
Input validation & sanitization
CORS: understand & configure correctly
Security headers: CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options

topics.title: Data Privacy & Compliance
tasks: GDPR basics: data protection, consent, right to be forgotten
Indonesian PDP Law (UU PDP): local compliance
Data encryption: at rest vs in transit, TLS/SSL
Audit logging: who accessed what, when
Secret management: env vars, Vault basics

topics.title: Supply Chain Security
tasks: Dependency scanning: Snyk, npm audit, Trivy
Container security: image scanning
SAST/DAST basics: SonarQube, OWASP ZAP
SBOM (Software Bill of Materials)
Signed commits & artifacts (Sigstore)

phases.title: FDE Skills & Career
phases.description: The FDE differentiator — customer, communication, problem-solving

topics.title: Debugging & Problem Solving
tasks: Systematic debugging: reproduce → isolate → fix → verify
Root cause analysis: 5 Whys, fishbone diagram
Network debugging: curl, browser DevTools, Wireshark basics
Database debugging: slow queries, explain plans
Debug 10 real-world scenarios from open source

topics.title: Customer & Communication Skills
tasks: Requirements gathering: ask the right questions
Translate tech ↔ business: explain to non-tech stakeholders
Expectation management: say 'no' diplomatically
Scoping: estimate effort realistically (under-promise, over-deliver)
Write: technical docs, runbooks, customer guides

topics.title: Business Acumen: Stakeholders & Real Impact
tasks: STAKEHOLDER MAP: C-Suite (ROI), VP (efficiency), Manager (timeline), Users (UX), IT (security)
SPEAK THEIR LANGUAGE: C-Suite wants numbers, Users want simplicity, IT wants compliance
REVENUE IMPACT: MRR growth via churn reduction (15% → 5% abandonment = $1.8M/year)
OPEX REDUCTION: AWS optimization ($50K/mo → $32.5K = $210K/year savings)
ROI FRAMEWORK: (Gain - Cost) / Cost × 100 — justify every project with numbers
KEY METRICS: MRR, ARR, Churn Rate, ARPU, LTV, CAC, NPS, TCO, OpEx
IMPACT REPORT: Before/after metrics, ROI calculation, recommendation for next phase
SCOPING: MoSCoW (Must/Should/Could/Won't), Impact vs Effort matrix, under-promise over-deliver
WRITE IMPACT EMAILS: Problem → Solution → Impact → Cost → Next Steps format
INDUSTRY PATTERNS: Fintech (compliance), E-commerce (conversion), SaaS (retention), Healthcare (data privacy)

topics.title: Portfolio & Interview Prep
tasks: Build 3-5 FDE-specific projects (deployed, integrated, secured)
FDE interviews: system design, debugging challenge, customer scenario
LeetCode: 20 easy, 15 medium (JS)
Behavioral: STAR method, customer-facing stories
Resume: highlight deployment, integration, customer-facing experience

milestones.title: ✅ JS Types & Closures
milestones.check: Can explain closures & coercion without notes

milestones.title: ✅ JS Functions & OOP
milestones.check: Can explain this binding, build polyfills

milestones.title: ✅ JS Async
milestones.check: Can build Promise from scratch, predict event loop

milestones.title: ✅ JS DOM & Browser
milestones.check: Can build mini SPA without framework

milestones.title: ✅ JS + TypeScript Complete
milestones.check: Can write strictly-typed code, design patterns

milestones.title: ✅ React & State Management
milestones.check: Can build component library with custom hooks

milestones.title: ✅ Frontend Engineering
milestones.check: Can build full Next.js app with a11y

milestones.title: ✅ Backend & Databases
milestones.check: Can build REST API with auth, DB, caching

milestones.title: ✅ API Integration
milestones.check: Can integrate 3rd party APIs, handle errors

milestones.title: ✅ Cloud & Containers
milestones.check: Can deploy app to AWS with Docker

milestones.title: ✅ CI/CD & Monitoring
milestones.check: Can set up pipeline with observability

milestones.title: ✅ Security & Compliance
milestones.check: Can secure app, handle sensitive data

milestones.title: ✅ FDE Ready
milestones.check: Ready to apply for FDE roles
